scripts.package:chrome: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../sms-grades-chrome.zip . -x 'manifest.firefox.json'
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build && cd dist && mv manifest.json manifest.chrome.json && mv manifest.firefox.json manifest.json && zip -r ../sms-grades-firefox.zip . -x 'manifest.chrome.json' && mv manifest.json manifest.firefox.json && mv manifest.chrome.json manifest.json
scripts.package: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
